events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: Grounding electrode system, GEC spliced improperly, rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. This is non-compliant. Risk high? Improper splice in grounding electrode conductor can compromise grounding/equipment bonding, shock hazard, lightning fault. In industrial site high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80? Value not asked 0. Sound etc default. Findings: GEC splice not made with listed irreversible compression connector or exothermic welding; splice not accessible/re-encapsulated? Need visible defect cues: mechanical splice/ wire nut on GEC, splice not exothermic or irreversible compression, splice not accessible, conductor damaged, splice not re-encapsulated, missing label? NEC 250.64(C) splices must be made with irreversible compression-type connector listed as grounding and bonding or by exothermic welding. Also GEC must be continuous to bonding jumper; splices allowed if listed. Also 250.68 connections to electrodes. Actions: remove improper splice, install listed irreversible compression connector or exothermic weld, ensure accessible, test continuity/resistance, inspect. References: NEC 250.64(C), 250.50, 250.68 maybe 250.64(A) etc. Need JSON only. Ensure valid JSON.
